notes: MDWFP winter stocking; bank-fishing pond at Lake Lamar Bruce near Saltillo — MS's ONLY public rainbow trout fishery. ~3-trout daily limit, no size restriction. Season Dec-Feb when water temps allow survival.
MDWFP winter stocking cadence (mid-season). Sole MS public trout water.
MDWFP winter stocking cadence (end of season). Sole MS public trout water; season closes when water temps rise.
